notes: Generated by ci/check_m3_claim_manifest.py from the M3 claim-manifest matrix and the canonical upstream seeds. Do not edit by hand; refresh the matrix or a seed and re-run the generator.

rows.headline: Open and local-core boundaries stay explicit across channels.
rows.notes: Canonical open/local versus managed boundary truth. The row stays Limited until the boundary manifest graduates from strawman to ratified machine-readable form.

rows.headline: One exact build identity governs every claimed artifact family.
rows.notes: Exact-build identity publication truth. Narrows to Limited until a coordinated release packet and a live running-build publisher exist.

rows.headline: Public benchmark claims travel with one proof envelope.
rows.notes: Benchmark publication truth. Stays experimental until a current public-proof packet lands.

rows.headline: Docs, Help/About, service health, and support quote one freshness truth.
rows.notes: Shared docs / Help / About / service-health / support freshness vocabulary. Claim-bearing once the badge vocabulary fixtures land.

rows.headline: Version-skew truth is quoted, not re-invented.
rows.notes: Shared compatibility and version-skew truth. Narrows to Limited while distributed-profile and helper lanes remain seed-only.

rows.headline: Launch-wedge and certified-archetype claims stay tied to current evidence.
rows.notes: TypeScript web-app launch-wedge claim family. Renders as experimental until a current archetype report and bundle publication lane land.

rows.headline: Open and local-core boundaries stay explicit across channels.
rows.notes: Extension runtime, SDK, and publication path inherit boundary and exact-build truth; downgrade rules fire on SDK-breaking change without migration or unavailable publication mirror.

rows.headline: Docs, Help/About, service health, and support quote one freshness truth.
rows.notes: Debug, test, and task execution model inherits docs/help freshness and version-skew truth; downgrades on stale reference workspace reports or regressions on certified archetypes.

rows.headline: One exact build identity governs every claimed artifact family.
rows.notes: Packaging, update, and rollback inherits exact-build truth so coordinated artifact sets stay coherent; downgrades on rollback drill failure or handler conflict.

rows.headline: Open and local-core boundaries stay explicit across channels.

rows.headline: Docs, Help/About, service health, and support quote one freshness truth.

rows.headline: Docs, Help/About, service health, and support quote one freshness truth.
rows.notes: Importer, migration parity, and known-gap honesty inherits docs freshness and schema-epoch truth; downgrades on import-bridge regression.
